entry.title: SAP PO FILE adapter additional file not keeping original file type in MAIL adapter as attachment
entry.content:
I have FILE to MAIL scenario. File sender is processing two file FileToMail.mail and FileToMail.csv. The first one serves as mail body and second one as attachment processed by additional files option in file adapter.

The issue is that FileToMail.csv is attaching as FileToMail.xml and i dont know why. I cant find the reason why is it changing its extension from .csv to .xml and tried many things to fix it without success.

Here is my file sender:

and here is my mail receiver:

I upload these two files into ftp

and result is always this. Mail body correctly processed but attachment with wrong extension:

entry.title: Re: How to receive and invoice bitcoin in SAP - Proof of Concept
entry.content:
Hi Koni,

SAP does some development but unfortunately not on bitcoin blockchain or bitcoin L2 implementation like Lightning or Liquid. See following link Payments without boundaries: Embark on the future ... - SAP Community

"SAP Digital Currency Hub currently supports PYUSD on the Ethereum and USDC on the Ethereum and Polygon blockchain"

It seems that blockchain technology is seen as payment layer by SAP and not as asset layer.

I will try to get in contact with 

  • SAP Digital Currency Hub

entry.title: Re: Using on-premise systems in your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant
entry.content:
Dear @rtok ,

First, I'd like to mention that the IPS connector for SAP Application Server ABAP (AS ABAP) source system uses specific Business Application Programming Interface (BAPI) functional modules. You can see which they are in the documentation for this source provisioning system: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/sap-application-server-abap?locale=en-US

If you develop custom function modules in ABAP, they won't be consumable by the IPS connector for this source system.

If you use the ones that are already implemented in the IPS connector for the AS ABAP source system, then you can take advantage of the *.filter properties. They are described in the above-mentioned documentation page. They can help in making IPS read only some users, not all of them, from the source system. Conditions on "user" or "group" section of the transformation of the provisioning system can also be used to limit further which entities IPS provisions to the target system, and which would be skipped.

Regarding the termination of user accounts on the target system - do you mean user deletion or user deactivation? Some target systems support the latter, and most support the former (with very few exceptions - you can identify them if the default transformation for a target system contains "skipOperations":["delete"] in the "user" section of the transformation). If it is deletion - then the assigned roles should not contain the user any longer, once it is deleted from the target system. If it is deactivation, however, then it needs to be considered further how to achieve the desired behavior based on the type of the target system.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Note 3537136 (BEN: Annual limits for tax year 2025) has been released.

Thank you,
Carlos

entry.title: Re: Everything about using SAP Business Transformation center for SDT S/4 HANA Conversion 2023 from
entry.content:
Hi ,

Great blog! The explanation of Selective Data Transition (SDT) methods—Shell Conversion and Mix & Match—was very clear. I appreciate how you outlined the role of SAP BTC in streamlining the migration process to S/4HANA, especially with the integration into SAP Cloud ALM and no additional licensing costs for eligible customers. The step-by-step guide on accessing the tools and demo environment is also very useful.

Thanks for sharing this helpful overview!

Regards ,

entry.title: [VBA] GuiOfficeIntegration : Long text and how to update document opened in Word
entry.content:
Hello,

I have field which, when updated, opens a word document. I then type text in the word document, then click on F3 (back button) and the text I typed is displayed in the field.

I recorded this action to get the vbscript.

Here it is:

session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAB_STRIP/tabpTAB_STRIP_FC4/ssubTAB_STRIP_SCA:SAPLZUE_EDIT_DISPLAY:9002/btnRC_LT").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlSCMSW_CONTAINER_2102/shellcont/shell").setDocument 1,"the text I want to insert in base64 very long text"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[3]").press

When I execute this code, what happens is the word document which is initially opened is closed, a new one opens, my text is put inside of it and the back button is pressed.

The problem is my text is not saved. I presume it is because SAP gets the content of the first word file initially opened.

Is there any way I can achieve what I am trying to achieve with VBA (i.e. : insert my text in the initial word document) without the use of SendKeys ?

Thanks

Hi ,

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tUIG34xT3oo

https://help.pubsub.em.services.cloud.sap/Get-Started/get-started-lp.htm

Regards,

entry.title: Streamlining Compliance with SAP Localization for Qatar Withholding Tax and Payment Retentions.
entry.content:
Compliance with local regulations is crucial for seamless operations in today's global business environment. For businesses operating in Qatar, understanding and adhering to the local requirements for supplier payment retentions and withholding tax (WHT) is essential. SAP’s localization solution for Qatar offers a robust framework to ensure compliance with these regulations, as outlined in Circular No. 2 from 2011.

Understanding the Regulatory Landscape

Qatar’s tax regulations mandate that certain final contract amounts must be retained from payments made to temporary branches. This retention is either 3% of the contract value (excluding the val

ue of supply and work carried out abroad) or the final contractual payment, whichever is higher. The retained amount is held until the temporary branch provides a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the General Tax Authority (GTA).

SAP Localization Solution for Qatar

SAP’s localization solution for Qatar was developed to help businesses streamline compliance with these regulations efficiently. The solution integrates seamlessly with SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, providing automated processes for managing supplier payment retentions and withholding tax.

The solution integrates the specific requirements for supplier payment retentions and withholding tax into the SAP system, ensuring that all necessary checks and validations are performed automatically.

Key Features

    1. Automated Validation:
      • The SAP localization solution automatically checks the company code, tax card, and commercial registration status, ensuring compliance before processing payments.

        To activate the enhanced solution for retention-based validations in SAP S/4HANA using the customizing “Activate Enhanced Localization for Withholding Tax and Retention for Qatar” (view V_FIAPQAC_AP_MIG). Learn more about the activation of enhanced solution at this link.
        To activate retention-based validations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, use “Activate Validations for Withholding Tax and Payment Retention Liability” (SSCUI ID: 105883).
        The activation blocks excess payments to suppliers.
        Maintain unique payment block reasons with “Check Payment Block Reason” (SSCUI ID: 101040).
        For automatic payments, map these reasons using “Specify Payment Blocks for Validation Categories” (SSCUI ID: 104350).

         

    2. Retention Logic:
      • The solution includes the latest QA retention logic, ensuring that payments are withheld appropriately based on the supplier's compliance status.
      • The solution automatically calculates the retention amount based on the contract value and the specific criteria outlined in the regulations.
      • Before processing payments, the solution checks for the presence of a valid NOC from the GTA. If the NOC is not available, the payment is retained.

  1. Withholding Tax Calculation:
    • The solution ensures that withholding tax is applied correctly based on the supplier’s residency status, registration status, contract duration, and the necessary certificates as required by law.

  2. Error Handling and Warnings:
    • The system raises appropriate warnings and errors if any compliance issues are detected with the supplier’s tax card or commercial registration, preventing non-compliant payments from being processed.

Ensuring Smooth Operations

By leveraging SAP’s localization solution, businesses can ensure compliance with Qatar’s regulatory requirements, minimizing the risk of penalties and operational disruptions. The solution's automated processes and comprehensive checks streamline the management of supplier payments and withholding tax, allowing businesses to focus on their core operations.

Supplier Payment Retentions and Withholding Tax

Supplier payment retentions and withholding tax are standard practices to ensure that suppliers fulfill their contractual obligations. In Qatar, the process involves several key steps and checks:

  1. Payment Initiation: The process begins with initiating a payment in the SAP system.

  2. Company Code Validation: The system checks if the payment is associated with a Qatar company code.
    • If not, the payment proceeds without additional checks.
    • If yes, the system proceeds to the next step.

  3. Retention Logic Activation: The system verifies if the new retention logic is active.
    • If not, the old retention solution is applied.
    • If yes, the system continues with the new logic.
  4. QFC Certificate Validation: The system checks for a valid QFC (Qatar Financial Centre) certificate.
    • If valid, the process continues.
    • If not, the old retention solution is applied.

  5. Residency, Tax Card Checks, and Commercial Registration: The system verifies the supplier's residency status and the availability of a tax card. Payments cannot be made to suppliers with expired commercial registrations or a tax card that was not presented.
    • Use the country-specific tab in the Maintain Business Partner app master to manage the Supplier's Tax Card and Residency status. Learn more about Qatar's Tax Card at this link.
    • Use the country-specific tab in the Maintain Business Partner app master to manage the Supplier's Certificates and residency status. Learn more about the Supplier Certificate at this link.
Retention Scenarios for non-resident suppliers:

A non-resident supplier has a non-permanent branch linked to a specific period or project at least one year

  • Retain all payments under the contract until a tax card is presented. 
  • Retain the final payment or 3% of the contract value (whichever is higher) until a valid NOC from the GTA is presented.

A non-resident supplier has a permanent branch registered in the Commercial Register.

  • Retain the final payment under the contract until a tax card is presented.

Retention Scenarios for Resident Suppliers:

A resident supplier does not have a tax card

  • Retain the final payment under the contract until a tax card is presented.

 

Withholding Tax (WHT):

Withholding tax is crucial to Qatar's tax system, particularly for non-resident suppliers. The key points include:

  1. Liability: Suppliers must ensure their tax cards and valid commercial registrations to avoid payment disruptions.
      • The Withholding tax applies to payments made to non-resident suppliers who are not registered in the Commercial Register or are registered for short-term activity contracts for less than a year.
      • The withholding tax is also applicable if the commercial registration of a non-resident supplier has expired.
      • The automatic determination of Withholding Tax for services is based on Material Group Classification as local, foreign, or exempt. For local services, it uses the configuration step Specify Service Origin and Withholding Tax Codes for Material Groups. 

        To activate the enhanced solution for retention-based validations in SAP S/4HANA using the customizing “Specift Service Origin and Withholding Tax Codes for Material Groups” (view FIWTQAV_MGC). Learn more about the activation of enhanced solution at this link.
        To activate retention-based validations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, use “Specift Service Origin and Withholding Tax Codes for Material Groups” (SSCUI ID: 104295).
        Withholding tax only applies to local services. When multiple codes exist in the supplier master data, a single tax code is selected for purchase order-based and supplier invoices.

        The supplier is subject to a couple of withholding taxes related to two services.


        Only one Withholding Tax code has been captured based on the Material Group Classification assigned



  2. Statutory Reports and Supplier Certificates: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance enables you to process and monitor the statutory reports for the use of your businesses with operations in Qatar. It comprises functions designed for laws and business practices. As a result, your business stays compliant with local legal obligations in Qatar for the following statutory reports:
    • Withholding Tax Declaration report.
    • The Withholding Tax Certificate is a correspondence form that generates all withholding tax certificates for foreign suppliers based on withholding tax transactions from the Withholding Tax Declaration report.

Conclusion

Compliance with local regulations is a critical aspect of doing business in Qatar. SAP’s localization solution for Qatar offers a comprehensive framework to efficiently manage supplier payment retentions and withholding tax. By automating key processes and ensuring rigorous compliance checks, the solution helps businesses easily navigate the complexities of Qatar’s regulatory landscape.

Useful Links

  • Learn more about the enhanced solution for Qatar Withholding Tax and Payment Retention at this link.
  • Learn more about the withholding tax statutory reports available for Qatar at this link.
  • Learn more about the old solution in SAP S/4HANA at this link.

entry.title: Commerce Cloud: OCC V2 stateless (for Spartacus) with synchronous order management (LORD in SAP R3)
entry.content:
Hey at all,

i try to figure out the following: Is there a default way to use SOM (LORD with SAP R3) in comibination with OCC V2 (stateless) with spartacus?

Now in Detail:
We are trying to implement Spartacus (Composable Storefront) at the moment. Actually we are using the default b2b storefront with SAP R3 and the synchronous order management (Lean order management).
I checked out the standard code and in - for example - DefaultBolCartFacade -> public Basket getCart(). There the code is referencing to bean 'sapOrdermgmtCartBO' which is stored in the scope called 'sapSession'.
Of course the session scope - and the sapSession - in the OCC V2 is not available anymore because of the stateless system. So its not possible to store the ERP Basket in the sapSession.
How to handle this situation? Do we have to implement our own solution or is there something which i can use from SAP?
Have someone the same situation?

Thank you all!!

entry.title: Re: Internal reconciliation is not asking for the reconciliation date
entry.content: I’m encountering a similar issue with internal reconciliation for a business partner whose reconciliation currency differs from the local currency. When performing the reconciliation with admin rights, I’m able to post it on the specified date, 31.10.24. However, when attempting this as any other user, a message appears stating, 'The exchange rate tax will be posted with the current system date,' and if I proceed, the reconciliation is posted as today’s date. I've reviewed all relevant permissions but haven’t identified the one affecting this setting. Any insights or solutions would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.
entry.content:
Hi all,

In List report of fiori elements application when adding the progressive indicator in list page table i am getting error that 
Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details::Products--dataPoint::UnitsInStock::Label'  

please help me how to resolve it?

entry.title: Re: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content: When the ML activated and MAP is diffrent from the PO price two accounting documents will be genarated.

entry.title: Re: What is the Applied date in the applied transaction window.
entry.content: I have the same issue but I can do the reconciliation myself as Admin with the chosen date, any other user posts it with current date. I can't find in the authorisations something to fix this. Any idea which authorisation is the one affecting this?

entry.title: Re: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sale...
entry.content: I tried it. But have doubts. Point 1: We can move the 50% expired batches to production MRP area. But at the beginning the produced material will be places at Production MPR area as I mentioned Production storage location in material right. Then is it needed to move this new material manually to sales MRP area to consider this for sales orders.

entry.title: Re: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content: One with MAP, and second one is differnt between MAP and PO price. Even though two account documents are generated net effect will be same,

entry.title: Re: What is the Applied date in the applied transaction window.
entry.content: As an admin I can reconcile the BP in FC as 31.10.24 but not as other user. Any idea which authorisation is the one relevant for this? Thanks

entry.title: Re: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sale...
entry.content: Point 2: So now all the new materials will be in sales MRP area. In case we don't have any sale order. Suddenly we got dependent requirement from prd MRP area. Then this new material stock available in sales MRP area will not be considered for dependent requirements right. How to mitigate this

entry.title: 404 Not Found: Requested route ('859a5208trial-dev-nsdemosampleapp-approuter.cfapps.us10-001.hana.on
Re: How to handle exceptions in Odata receiver adapter in...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

unfortunately, there seems to be no easy configuration for the OData adapter.

The obvious answer would be to use a HTTP receiver instead of OData.

 

If, for whatever reason, Odata is required for your use case, Irvinrufus described a possible solution in this blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-cpi-exception-handling-tips-return-to-main-flow/ba-p/13571453

 

In the example below, I implemented an iFlow that is similar to your requirement:

 

 

There are 2 OData calls:

  • First call (Request Reply 1) determines if the iFlow is relevant to this use case.
    If not, the OData will return 404. This must not fail the message processing but is considered a "regular" termination of the process.
  • Second call (getProductDetails) shall only be executed if the iFlow is relevant.
    Any error here (or later in the iFlow) should lead to the CPI message failing.

 

In an ideal world, you would use a Router to determine if an exception should lead to failure or not.

Unfortunately, Router is not supported within the exception flow. That’s why I used process call to handle further processing outside the exception sub process.

 

See below for the configuration of the router to achieve this behavior:

 

 

 

 

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Complex Type Access from EDMX file
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to access a complex type property from an EDMX file metadata. But I am unable to expose it under my entity. Inspite of taking the approach in different ways, I couldnt establish the service.

API_MANAGE_WORKFORCE_TIMESHEET is the API
Recorded Hours need to be exposed.

Please do the needful if you know anything

Thanks

entry.title: Re: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sale...
entry.content: Point 3: In sales order I have given the sales MRP area and in PIR for header material, I have given production MRP area. I maintained the production supply area in component to pass the dependent requirement to production MRP area. Now how the production order will consider the stock from Sales MRP area if the stock is not there in production MRP area. How the PIR need to be maintained for production at header level. How the MRP to be run. At Plant level or Production / sales MRP area level?

entry.title: Handling Sales Order Restrictions When Planned Orders Are Created
entry.content:
Hello,

We have below business requirement for Make to Order.

Whenever a sales order is created for a make-to-order product, once a planned order is generated for the sales order after the MRP run, the system should not allow any amendments to the sales order.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Customer Checkout integration with VIVA
entry.content:
Hi Lorenz,

Thanks for your reply! Yes, you can use a custom plugin within CCO to trigger communication with a microservice. The plugin acts as a bridge, calling the microservice via a defined REST or SOAP endpoint. You’ll configure the plugin with the microservice’s URL, authentication details, and parameters. Once set up, CCO triggers the plugin as part of the communication flow.

entry.title: Re: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submit Statement?
entry.content: Hi Sandeep, is the profit center a parameter of the standard selection of F.01 or is it a free selection parameter?

entry.title: Re: Convert Integer to Hexadecimal
entry.content:
It works as expected, the line is found:

TYPES:
  BEGIN OF ts_itab_line,
    hex TYPE x LENGTH 8,
  END OF ts_itab_line.
TYPES tt_itab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ts_itab_line WITH EMPTY KEY.
DATA(itab) = VALUE tt_itab( ( hex = '000000000000000A' ) ).
LOOP AT itab ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<line>) WHERE hex = 10.
  WRITE / 'found'.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: I want to fetch the sgtxt on sap script form on main...
entry.content: What didn't you understand in my answer? Do you know what is a global variable? Is LW_REFER a global variable?

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello Venkatesh @VEH2,

Unless explicitly configured differently in BPVAL configuration option, BPA is collected from the federal (463) and provincial (462) infotypes during payroll processing. This means that those infotypes need to be updated.

Many customers use Tax Update Utility (program RPUTXUK0) to mass-update the infotypes for all employees. You can evaluate and test that option in a controlled environment.

Regards,

Jonas

entry.title: Re: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submi...
entry.content: Read the ABAP documentation. For logical databases, use WITH FREE SELECTIONS.

entry.title: Re: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submi...
entry.content:
Hi Sandeep,

is the profit center a parameter of the standard selection of F.01 or is it a free selection parameter?

For a free selection parameter you have to use WITH FREE SELECTIONS:

 

SUBMIT rfbila00 ... 
   VIA SELECTION-SCREEN
   WITH FREE SELECTIONS texpr.

 

See example here.

entry.title: Re: Extract Long Text from Notification or Work Order
entry.content:
Hey Sorin,

thank you for that example! To be honest I do not understand how that can be helpful. If you have only one notification or one order you can always open the notification or the order and see the long text directly in it. 

I am looking for a possibility to use the read_text functionality to read lots of longtext from lots of notifications atm...

entry.title: Re: Regarding the "The service metadata is invalid" error...

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE not setting RESB-KZEAR field
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to set the RESB-KZEAR field via BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE but it is not happening .

We are passing the below Fields in FM.

goodsmvt_code -proj = '03'.

       goodsmvt_header -pstng_date      = sy-datum.
        goodsmvt_header -doc_date        = sy-datum.

       goodsmvt_item -material          = wa_mspr_proj-matnr.
       goodsmvt_item -plant             = wa_mspr_proj-werks.
        goodsmvt_item -stge_loc          = wa_mspr_proj-lgort.
    goodsmvt_item -move_type         = '281'.
        goodsmvt_item -spec_stock        = wa_mspr_proj-sobkz.
goodsmvt_item -entry_qnt         = wa_mspr_proj-prlab.
      goodsmvt_item -entry_uom         = wa_mspr_proj-meins.
  goodsmvt_item -mvt_ind           = space.
      goodsmvt_item -val_wbs_elem      = wa_wbs.
      goodsmvt_item -reserv_no         = wa_mspr_proj-rsnum.
        goodsmvt_item -res_item          = wa_mspr_proj-rspos.
      goodsmvt_item -activity          = wa_mspr_proj-vornr.
    goodsmvt_item -batch             = wa_mspr_proj-charg.    "" INS 134598
       goodsmvt_item -item_text         = 'Automatic posting'.
        goodsmvt_item -withdrawn         = 'X'.
Can some one please tell me if we are missing any field here so that the Indicator is not being set.

Thanking In Advance!

entry.title: Re: #CoE #DH01 Import Account Balance from the Bank
entry.content: Hello, I have completed all the necessary settings in Bank Statements and selected “Manual Entry” and “Spreadsheet Import of Balances” to be allowed. However, in the Bank Account Level - Relationship Tab - Balance Update Method, these entries are not allowed, and I cannot edit them. Do you know how to enable the “Balance from Manual Entry” and “Enable Balance from Spreadsheet” options in order to use the Manage Bank Account Balances Fiori app? Thank you.

I have a task to get all the attachments on header level in the attachment list, including all the item's attachments as well.

Balazs

entry.title: Good day, we are planning to integrate S4HANA Private cloud & Maximo, any idea how to start ?
entry.content:
we are planning to integrate s4hana asset management and Maximo 

1st Scenario

work orders with operations will be done in Maximo then pr will be triggered for external services in sap and budget check will happen in sap then services & material purchasing with reference to contract till invoice and settlement will be done in sap then we want to update work orders in Maximo later.

2nd scenario

contracts will be created in sap then they want it to be created in Maximo then in Maximo service entry sheets will be created based on subcontractor performance we want to interface SES back to sap 

we need to integrate using APIs and i need clear vision on how to do to integration and requirements from both systems from hardware , software & Business?

entry.title: Re: Enhancing Operational Efficiency with SAP's Manage Work Center Capacities Application
entry.content:
Hi, 

does the app also work with PP/DS relevant work center? for me the app is always empty.

entry.title: Re: Allowing negative stocks
entry.content: This seems to be an old thread but was missing an solution it seems so thought to post still. For plant to appear in OMJ1, you should add plant in SPRO>IMG>MM>IM>Plant Parameters and then create new entry for your plant & tick allowed negative stocks. This screen is same as OMJ1 so you can now go in OMJ1 & update rest.

entry.title: Re: Type ERROR:Cannot read properties of undefined (readi...
entry.content: is that an analytical service?

entry.title: Binding transfer problem
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a problem when trying to transfer binding from Action to Page.

When I click on object table row and afterwards navigate directly to a Page, all works fine, the fields on that page show the binding informations.

If i click on the same Object Table but i navigate on a Popup(choose an operation(buttons) that affects the target page) and from Popop to the Page, the Page does not receive the binding from the first action:

Object Table -> OnPress(NavToPopup) -> Press Button on Popup -> OnPress(Initialize and Fetch data) -> NavToShowSalesOrderPage

I tried to use rules in the OnPress event of Popup Buttons but I was unable to transfer the binding.

OnPress Event of Pupup Button(Initialize)

   let pageProxy = clientAPI.getPageProxy();

    clientAPI.showActivityIndicator(clientAPI.localizeText('Loading'));
    clientAPI.executeAction("/App/Actions/ClosePage.action");

    pageProxy.setActionBinding(pageProxy.getBindingObject());
     
    return clientAPI.executeAction("/App/Rules/CreateSalesOrder/FetchSalesOrder.js");
export default async function FetchSalesOrder(clientAPI) {

    let pageProxy = clientAPI.getPageProxy();

    //get action binding
    var binding = pageProxy.getActionBinding();

    //get client data
    let appClientData = pageProxy.getAppClientData(); 
    


....Fetch Operations...


    clientAPI.dismissActivityIndicator();
    return clientAPI.executeAction("/App/Actions/ShowSalesOrderActions/NavToShowSalesOrder.action");
   

}

How I can transfer the binding ?

Thank you.

entry.title: CK11n_Price from Purchasing Info Record_Pipeline Material
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While executing the standard cost estimation (CK11n), we are getting the error message ‘CK168’ for one of the material components with material type Pipe.

As analyzed, the material valuation price is not getting captured in standard cost run from the available purchasing Info record (Category P) for pipeline material.

Please note in costing variant for material valuation, we have a strategy L-price from purchase info records.

System has the valid purchase info record and vendor source list. 

Since this is the mandatory requirement from Business, we are looking forward your support. Please suggest.

entry.title: Is it possible to consider the stock from two storage locations MRP area for single requirement.
entry.content:
I have two storage location MRP areas. one for the Production storage location and the other for the Sales storage location.

For sales orders, I will pick stock only from the sales storage location.

But for production orders, I will pick stock from both sales and production storage locations. (Currently, If I give the requirements at the plant MRP area, it's getting passed to the Storage location MRP area based on the Production storage location)

Is there any way to do this on standard MRP?

If yes how are the requirements for the sales order and Production orders to be maintained and how is the MRP to be executed? At plant MRP area or at Sloc MRP area.

Header material

Component material

entry.title: Add a new Field Catalog for Custom Field
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I would like to create a new Field Catalog for a Custom Field that I have created.

The following error message appears:

Field YY1_WORKFORCE_SDI does not exist in table KOMG, KOMK, or KOMP

Can you help me here?

I have already activated all points in the User Interfaces, Analytics and APIs areas in the settings of the Custom Field.

Best regards

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: In SAP Sales Cloud Version 2, how to update custom field from external system.
entry.content: did you find the solution ?

entry.title: Manage work center capacity App not show PP/DS Relevant work center
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I need some help. the App Manage work center capacity is empty for me. all work centers within the planned are Relecant for PP/DS. dies this mean I am not able to use the app at all? 

all work center does have 2 capacities assigned - Machine and Labour. 

could you give some help please. 

Thnaks in advance and best regards

entry.title: Re: Refreshing Webdynpro abap application on Action.
entry.content: Hello Krishna, I know that the question is very old, but I am having the same problem and I could not solve it. If you solved this problem, I would be very happy if you share it with me. Best Regards

entry.title: Re: CK11n_Price from Purchasing Info Record_Pipeline Material
entry.content: and error message 'No price could be determined for material XXX plant XXX message CK465'

entry.title: Re: atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STA...
entry.content:
Hi,

can you provide some more context information, please? What did you do when the error happened, and so on.

Kind regards,

Wolfgang

entry.title: How to subscribe to SuccessFactors Employee Central via Test, Demo and Development environment
entry.content:
Hi All,

Myself Abdullah Shaik, working for Invenics Services Ltd and there is a POC requirement came to us which is below:

Requirement: Extract the data from SF Employee Central using SAP Datasphere and load it into SAP HANA and generate the reports.

As part of the requirement, we have subscribed to SAP Datasphere using TDD (Test, Demo and Development environment subscription). However, I am not finding the right place to use the same TDD for SuccessFactors. Could you please help with the below queries along with the subscription process to SF EC?

a) How to subscribe to SF Employee Central?

b) As part of the subscription, do we get the Technical user of SF Employee Central?

c) Is there any data already available in the subscription system or do we need to load the data? If so, do we have the right admin access to load the data?

d) Assume that the subscription is done, is SAP going to charge message based triggers or do we have some xxx number of messages free? 

e) Any restriction on the messages processed between the applications/systems?

Best regards,

Abdullah Shaik.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Environment Variables
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

Thanks for the quick reply.

The downside of this is that you would still need to redeploy the project, unless I'm missing something; if you update the decision project it would create a new version, and you won't be able to update the dependency to the newer version on a deployed project, so you will end up deploying again regardless.

I do think this is actually valuable information, on bigger projects with complex approver determination rules it seems good practice to keep this separate from the business process workflow, so thank you for the tip!

It seems that for now all we can do is having a service with a table of approvers maintaned somewhere else, and simply calling its content from BPA

entry.title: Re: FB03 How to get all attachments on header level?
entry.content:
I'd say that hundreds of people did it and asked the question in the forum. Many answers were given.

NB: why tagging SAP BTP with FB03?

entry.title: Re: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sale...
entry.content: Hello, you can define a stock transfer special procurement type at MRP Area level, so that MRP creates stock transfer reservations to move the stock from the plant to the MRP Area in case of shortages. The process of moving batches close to the expiration to production would be manual.

entry.title: Re: Modeling a basic Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Yeah dont know why this is happening, I did do the above thing that you suggested (label semantics to the HIERARCHY_LABEL)

 

I redid the whole scenario again but its still happening.

entry.title: Changing field value for "Assigned To" in Work Order Operation in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is there any other configuration that needs to be checked that will allow me to change the "assigned to" value in the work order? 

Config. in backend

SSAM operation page/screen

Upon click on edit (pen) icon

As you can see I do not get the field in the edit to update the "Assigned To" field.

 

Any help on this is much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Analyse your data live with SAP Analytics Cloud on top of SAP BW/4HANA, SAP S/4HANA & SAP Da
entry.content:
I miss, above all, the interaction of JustAsk with SAP Joule and, above all, when the support of JustAsk for Live Connections will come. Furthermore, an integration of SAP Analytics Cloud in SAP Build Work Zone, Standard would also be worth mentioning. In particular, the interaction of the various AI-SAC initiatives in a central SAP Joule client integrated in Work Zone. 

All in all, a good overview/summary of the advantages and highlights of the Live Connection.

entry.title: Re: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectP
entry.content: How exactly are you adding the progressive indicator?

entry.title: Italy - XML eDocument attachment
entry.content:
How to attach pdf, .xlsx attachments in the XML? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Italy - XML eDocument attachment
entry.content:
Use the BADI 'Attachments to the XML File' to add attachments to the XML file of the eDocument and supports attachments with format Base64 and converts them to x String. 

Refer to the help portal below - APP Extensibility: eDocument Cockpit and Manage Electronic Documents | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I'm Dimitris and i really like to join that journey.

I know that the deadline passed but i finished my training on point, when i tried to leave a commnet here my access was still restricted.

I've seen an email for you and i came back to grab my chance!

Regards,

Dimitris

entry.title: Re: How to handle x-www-form-urlencoded Content-Type header in SAP PI
entry.content: Please check this https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/fetch-oauth-token-in-rest-is-now-out-of-the-box/bc-p/13389660. From what I understand, there isn't seem any restriction with getting the token so I guess you just need to properly configure the REST receiver channel.

entry.title: SAP Partner Delivery Manager Newsletter November 2024 - GROW with SAP
entry.content:
Note:  Links may require access to SAP PartnerEdge or Learning Hub

SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Public Edition                                                                                                                                                                             

Top Highlights

Overview

       Register/Access

 

 

 

 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization as a Self-Service Training

In the Localization as a Self-Service training will help on our Partners enablement through a training, in this classroom Localization as a self-service methodology and extensibility will be explained together with options to cover country specific requirements.

 

        Register

  • Onsite Session : 19th November 2024, Barcelona

 

Webinar: GROW with SAP partner delivery readiness

Join us on November 12 for the GROW with SAP Partner Delivery Readiness session in our Tuesday Jump-In series, supporting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementations. Topics include enablement resources, delivery maturity metrics, and project support, with live Q&A. Perfect for partners implementing GROW with SAP

        Register

  • Session 1: 12th November 2024, 8:00 AM - 9:00 AM Europe/London
  • Session 2: 12th November 2024, 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM Europe/London

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Expertise Services

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Expertise Services is a global team of 18 experts focused on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. Leveraging their extensive SAP network, they provide content and webinars on implementation essentials, fundamental series, and other key topics. Information on these events is available on their partner community site. The team aims to enhance partner expertise, drive cloud adoption, and support the full customer lifecycle, including integration with Ariba, SFSF, and Concur. Partners are encouraged to explore their offerings, register for events, and engage with the experts for success.

            Access

 

 

 

 

 

 

  
       

Events and Webinars for Partners

Overview

    Register/Access

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Essentials for Manufacturing

Welcome to the Implementation Essentials event on Manufacturing, hosted by Expertise Services. This 2-day, 2-hour-per-day session is designed for partner project teams working on or preparing for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementations. Attendees will get an overview of Manufacturing components, explore SAP Best Practices and configurations, and learn about integration and extensibility for Manufacturing projects.

Prerequisites: basic SAP Activate and Manufacturing knowledge.

 

 

        Register

  • Session 1: 11th November 2024, 09:30 AM - 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 2: 12th November 2024, 9:30 AM - 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam

 

 

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Essentials for Professional Services

Join us for the Implementation Essentials event on Professional Services, supporting teams working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition projects. This 2-day, 2.5-hour-per-day session covers end-to-end process essentials, org structure, scope items, cross-topics, and expert insights.

        Register

  • Session 1: 13th November 2024, 9:00 AM TO 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 2: 14th November 2024, 9:00 AM TO 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam

 

 

Webinar: SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain – the upsell opportunity for GROW with SAP

Join this webinar to discover how SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) for Supply Chain enhances the GROW with SAP offering, now featuring standard integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Topics include an overview of SAP IBP, its alignment with GROW, positioning strategies, and pricing details—ideal for partners aiming to expand their portfolios by adding SAP IBP for Supply Chain.

        Register

 

  • Session 1: 14th November 2024, 4:00 PM - 4:30 PM Europe/Berlin

 

 

 

 

Webinar: GROW with SAP in FSI

Join SAP's Falk Rieker, Global Head of Financial Services, and Stuart Grant, Head of Capital Markets, Asset and Wealth Management, as they explore SAP's offerings for Financial Services Institutions (FSI) with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This session will cover SAP's FSI strategy, opportunities in the APAC region, positioning GROW with SAP for FSI, and replicable success stories. Learn how GROW with SAP, along with our industry-leading solutions, can help fast-growing FSI organizations streamline operations and ensure long-term success.

 

        Register

 

  • Session 1: 14th November 2024, 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM Asia/Singapore

 

 

 

Webinar: Make the most of SAP support – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Hot Topic Series

Join SAP S/4HANA Cloud experts for a 60-minute session on maximizing SAP Support. Learn about 24/7 support channels like the Customer Interaction Center, SAP Help, and SAP Community, designed to assist with customer queries. Perfect for consultants, experts, and project managers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition projects. 

        Register

  • Session 1: November 11th – 7:30 AM to 8:30 AM CET (English)
  • Session 2: November 12th – 4:00 AM to 5:00 AM CET (Chinese)
  • Session 3: November 13th – 3:30 AM to 4:30 AM CET (Japanese)
  • Session 4: November 14th – 12:00 PM to 1:00 PM CET (English)
  • Session 5: November 15th – 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM CET (Spanish)
  • Session 6: November 15th – 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM CET (English)

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Webinar: Q4 2024 GROW with SAP global partner update

Join us for the Q4 2024 global webcast on GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, where we’ll discuss updates on SAP Global Trade Management, industry-specific developments, cross- and up-sell opportunities, localization, and partner growth options.

      Register

  • Session 1: 21st November 2024, 8:30 AM - 10:30 AM Europe/Berlin
  • Session 2: 21st November 2024, 4:30 PM - 6:30 PM Europe/Berlin

 

 

 

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation essentials – SAP Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management

Join us for the Implementation Essentials event on SAP Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management, designed for partner project teams involved in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementations. This 2-day session, lasting 2.5 hours each day, will provide essential insights and support for successful project execution.

      Register

  • Session 1: 21st November 2024, 9:00 AM - 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 2: 22nd November 2024, 9:00 AM - 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
 

 

In-Depth With SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition Series – Collection

 

 

The In-Depth with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition program offers deep-dive sessions to help customers and partners maximize the value of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. These sessions provide expert insights into the solution's features, functions, and the business benefits of its latest innovations.

       

       Recording

 

 

 

Transformation with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Overview

    Register/Access

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408

Join Gerhard Welker for an insightful video on the latest innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, focusing on asset management. Key highlights include enhanced recording of the "As-Found" condition, mass change custom fields for maintenance plans, and a new filter for maintenance requests. Discover how these updates can improve your asset management processes and boost efficiency. 

        Watch

 

 

Asset Revaluation & Acquisition in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition via SAP Build Process Automation 

Discover how SAP Build Process Automation is transforming asset revaluation and acquisition for finance teams in this blog by Hardeep Tulsi. Learn how seamless automation, low-code solutions, and AI-powered precision are improving accuracy and efficiency in asset management for a Professional Services company. Automate workflows effortlessly, extract data from documents, and reduce manual revaluation errors.

 

        Access

 

 

Localization and Identity & Access Management (IAM) with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release introduces powerful updates for global operations and identity management. Key features include new public sector localizations for Germany, Canada, and Australia, expanded versions for countries like Chile and Japan, enhanced IAM documentation for smooth user access, and automation tools for compliance. These updates simplify tax compliance, e-invoicing, and reporting while ensuring smooth user and role management across regions.

 

        Access

 

 

 

 

Release Assessment and Scope Dependency for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition : Partner TDD Systems

We’re excited to announce that the latest version of the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency tool now includes Partner TDD systems (Customizing 100) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This update addresses partner requests and ensures seamless upgrades with no Day 1 impact.

 

        Access

 

 

 

 

 

Foundational Elements for Harnessing the Power of Business AI in Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Ed.

Discover how to elevate your team's productivity and optimize business processes with AI in Marco Valencia's latest blog post. Learn about user empowerment through AI-driven UX, seamless integration with SAP Start, and the latest AI-enhanced best practices for material planning and sales order management.

 

        Access

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

       
        

Partner Delivery Groups

Overview

Register/Access

 

 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

This group focuses on providing enhanced learnings and periodic updates to the partner community with respect to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition product. Our goal is to facilitate collaboration with your peers and SAP subject matter experts.

 

       Access

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

This private group is focused solely on helping you make your SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition projects successful. We are dedicated to your success and work to quickly scale the latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition product knowledge, and solution lifecycle experiences out to the wider community. We welcome your questions and feedback here and look forward to your active participation.

 

       Access

SAP Business Technology Platform

Get up to speed with the latest content and activities in the SAP BTP Partner Group. Don’t miss out the upcoming SAP BTP Partner Community Call on September 20th. Get all the details, save your seat today and share with your network

       Access

 

SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network

In the SAP Ariba and Business Network Delivery Group, we excited to share that we are welcoming our Test, Demonstration & Development Program team, led by Prasanth Rajan, to the SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network Partner Delivery Group. This collaboration has allowed us to invite over 300 partner consultants who participate in the Test, Demonstration & Development Program. This initiative is key to enhancing our partner experiences and fostering stronger collaboration.

 

We are extending open invitations to our ISBN partners to ask their how-to questions, with a view to generate constructive and continuous learning in a growing partner group within SAP Community.

 

 

       Access

SAP SuccessFactors HXM

SAP SuccessFactors is delivering value across multiple types of Artificial Intelligence (AI).

  • Generative AI: Accelerate HR processes and tasks by quickly generating or summarizing text across the SAP SuccessFactors HXM suite.
  • Conversational AI: Deliver a better employee experience while lowering personnel costs with a natural language processing chatbot.
  • Automation: Lower personnel costs while increasing data accuracy and accelerating repetitive core HR processes.
  • Deep Learning AI: Transform talent development and employee experience with personalized recommendations and deep insights.

 

        Access

SAP Customer Experience & CRM

On regular cadences, we partner with internal Customer Experience & CRM subject matter experts to share best practices, new product information and thought leadership through delivery blogs in our partner delivery group. Our blogs are amplified through targeted communications and social media to help encourage engagement amongst partners and internal subject matter experts. Internal subject matter experts are always welcome to contribute blogs amongst any of our other solution partner delivery groups as well.

 

        Access

 

 

 

 

Copyright/Trademark  |  Privacy  |  Impressum

entry.title: Re: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content: But In Other QAS Server I Had Maintained Parameter to Test Only 1 Acounting Document and 1 Material Ledger was Generated , Even with Price Change

entry.title: Communication arrangement SAP_COM_0301
entry.content: We are implementing an S/4Hana System in the public cloud and would like to replicate employees from an external system using the API. We have now found that by activating SAP_COM_0301 it is possible to maintain contingent workers in the public cloud. However, these should not be maintained in the external HR system, as there is no customer master data available, which is mandatory for contingent workers when it is created in the public cloud. Is there a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Multiple Royalty Recipients in Condition Contract in...
entry.content: Thank you Andreas. so we create different condition contract for each co-authors. Also, I have created custom defined partner functions to accommodate all the co-authors in the sales order since sales order accepts one royalty recipient (RR). Custom partners were copied and created from the default (RR) and I can now add all co-authors in the sales order . The issue is that only the default RR is recognized when royalties is processed. In the public cloud, how can resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Can we deploy sapui5 web components app onto S/4 HANA...
entry.content:
Is this what you are looking for?

https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/abap-deploy

entry.title: Re: Settlement management rebates
entry.content:
Hi @kirankumardara, 

You can refer to the SAP standard configuration guide in KBA 2535889 for further details:
https://me.sap.com/notes/2535889/E

Regarding your issue, there could be a few potential causes. I’d recommend checking the following:

  • Condition Contract Types Configuration:
    Navigate to Condition Contract Management > Condition Contract Maintenance > Define Condition Contract Types. Ensure the contract types you intend to use are set to "Not Blocked - Can be Used."

  • User Role Access:
    Verify with your Security team if there are any role-based restrictions limiting access to specific contract types.

 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: Compatibility Scope: What Happens after 2025/2030
entry.content: Great block and valuable information

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting: Ordering a Credit Product from an External Credit Agency
entry.content:
Hello @Christina_WS , thanks for the blog Post. 
I have a quick question, and i hope you can help me. I want to order a Monitoring Product, but the Button to switch on "New Monitoring Order" cant be selected and is grey in the "Order Product" Tab. 
I checked, the Product is active and i also assigned it in the "Map Products to Rating Procedures" as Monitoring Product for Mass Activation. Can you tell me, why i cant select the Monitoring?

entry.title: Re: Settlement management rebates
entry.content: Hi Victor, Thanks for the response. The configuration you have suggested is already there in state "Not blocked-can be user". I'm attaching the screenshot for your perusal. @gvictor

entry.title: Re: Discount Name Field missing from Payment Terms
entry.content: hi thanks for the response, i the localization is set up to Mexico also i have check the UI part and click "restore the default" and the field does not appear what it could be?

entry.title: Upcoming Expert Deep Dive Live Sessions for Scripting Support , (Cloud) Hotfolders and Interceptors
entry.content:
I am excited to announce that I will be conducting live training sessions next week on the 26th,27th and 28th of November. The sessions will cover important topics in the field of Commerce Domain.

The first session will cover the topic of Scripting Support in SAP Commerce Cloud. This 2-hour session will provide an overview of scripting support and how to apply scripts in various aspects of SAP Commerce Cloud such as ImpEx, Cronjobs, Event handling, Task engine, and dynamic Business Process management.

Registration link :Identifying Scripting Support in SAP Commerce Cloud

The second session will focus on Understanding Hot Folders and Cloud Hot Folders in SAP Commerce Cloud. This 1-hour session will cover the implementation, configuration, and customization of the “Hot Folders” functionality, as well as provide an overview of “Cloud Hot Folders” and its architecture, processing flow, and configuration with SAP Commerce Cloud.

Registration link: Understanding Hot Folders and Cloud Hot Folders in SAP Commerce Cloud 

Lastly, the third session will introduce Interceptors in SAP Commerce Cloud. This 1-hour session will cover the concept of interceptors, different interceptor types, how to implement a new interceptor, and best practices for implementation. The session will end with a practical exercise demonstrating the steps of implementing a new interceptor and testing it on the SAP Commerce Cloud Storefront.

Registration link: Introducing Interceptors in SAP Commerce Cloud 

I look forward to welcoming eager learners to these live sessions. Happy Learning!

entry.title: GR Valuation for foreign currencies and GR Cancelation differencies (BSX transaction differencies)
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I found an interesting example of Goods Receipt Valuation for Purchase Orders when involving foreign currencies and Cancelation of the same GR. In particular for the BSX transaction.
All the below calculation and SAP logic is working as described here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/erpscm/3362168405.html

The scenario is the following.
Our local currency is USD, material has a standard price of 0,01 USD per 1 PC.
We create a PO in EUR for 100 000 PCs. Or exchange rate is 1,07049.

We post a GR with mvmt type 101.
BSX account is among the accounts which gets hit with value of 1000 EUR to 1000 USD.
This is calculated in the following way:
For local currency in USD BSX = 100 000PC*0,01USD/1PC = 1000.
For PO currency in EUR:
First we need to convert the standard local price per PC according the exchange rate in the PO - USD to EUR = 0,01/ 1,07049 = 0,009341517.SAP rounds this number to two places after the decimal 0,009341517=0,01EUR.
Now EUR BSX = 100 000PC*0,01USD/1PC = 1000. Exactly the same as is in the local USD.

So far so good. Now we want to cancel this GR posting using mvmt 102 in the same day, immediately after the previous posting.
However, when we do the cancellation and open the FI document we can notice that for BSX transaction EUR is not equal to USD like in the 101 posting.
BSX = 934,15EUR to 1000USD.
And this is due the fact that during the reversal SAP does not round the EUR exchange rate up to the second digit after the decimal but multiplies to the whole value. (100 000PC*0,009341517EUR, instead of 100 000PC *0,01EUR).

Have you noticed this behaviour? Is there a note which is supposed to fix this?
I have already browsed trough several, including https://me.sap.com/notes/191927/E but it rather seems to describe and confirm the above calculation than to fix it.

Will apricate your input.

Best Regards,
Boris

entry.title: Material type for only manage purchase orders
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to create a material only for purchase purpose. This material will be used to group other materials that we have in our company.

Imagine, we have 3 production lines. Our company requires to have separated stocks for each production line, so, today, we have 3 material numbers identifying same physical material. When we create a purchase order, we reference 3 material numbers, but for our vendor all 3 materials are the same.

So, we need to create a material which, once we have purchased, we will receive it and we will split in this 3 internal material codes, depending on their demand. And, I don't know, if it's possible to have all stock summarized to main code.

Thanks a lot.

Regards!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Environment Variables
entry.content: A simpler way to do it would be to create a group in the Custom IDP with any users who can approve, and specify this group as the approvers. Whenever you want to change the users you just change the users in the group.

entry.title: Re: atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STA...
entry.content:
hi,

it is a function module. I'm getting code inspector error.
This error is a naming conventions warning error within programming conventions. Message code LOCDAT .

I get invalid name error for line 8.
I need to fix it.

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Orders (Part 9): Creation with Reference
entry.content: Can this be done in the On prem version too? Or is this only available for Cloud.

entry.title: Re: BEx Query Designer with SAP GUI 8.00 64bit and Office...
entry.content: Thanks Bernhard, we found that the Web Application Designer is indeed installed however there was no shortcut created for it in the startmenu. After creating the shortcut manually we were able to start and use the Web Application Designer.

entry.title: How to visualize only the item "Cal. Year, 4 Special Periods" in Group Data Analysis?
entry.content:
In the FIORI app Group Data Analysis, if I try to filter using the dimension Fiscal Year the system shows all the possible fiscal year variants even if the version is set as "K4 Cal. Year, 4 Special Periods" (see the attachments)

Does exist a setting that make possible to visualize only "K4 Cal. Year, 4 Special Periods" periods?

Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Partner TDD Onboarding for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition – Guide for Common Issues
entry.content: For help with demos, kindly try the new unified SAP Demo Environment, granting partners free access to the same demo content, landscapes, and releases as SAP’s sales units. Details here - SAP Demo Environment 2.0

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between Write and Preprocessin...
entry.content:
Hi Rushi,

it always depends on the specific archiving object, but usually it's two different programs. The preprocessing is checking archivability and sets flags that marks the data as "archivable" and the write programm is creating the archive file.

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STA...
entry.content: The error means that your system (or quality) administrators have activated an ATC check that enforces specific naming conventions for ABAP identifiers. While SAP delivers the check itself, the configuration, i.e. which identifiers are valid for what kind of data objects, is the responsibility of the local administrators. If such a check is running, this means your organization has a general guideline for the naming of identifiers. Talk to your quality responsibles to find out which it is - from the outside we cannot tell you which naming convention is expected here.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Core Development Tools 3.42.0 vs ABAP Core Devel...
entry.content:
Dear Ingo

I have found the settings of my proxy, you can see in print screen attached.

Eclipse proxy settings are in: Menu > Window > preferences > Network connections

Is there anyway you can help me further to connect my Eclipse with SAP BTP trial account?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurment-2411 document
entry.content:
Hi 

As we can see the s/4 hana public cloud release is planned on the November 16 i.e 2411 for Production system, we are not able to fine the release document in the sap help portal, when we are checking it is redirecting to the Older version document i.e 2408  .


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurm...
entry.content:
Hi 

Preliminary What's New - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3 | SAP Help Portal

Preliminary What's New - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3 | SAP Help Portal (sourcing and procurement)

 Only one entry for Sourcing and procurement

 

Thank you
